title: Naboo training canyon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:SWS_NabTrainCan01.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Naboo pilots Rhys Dallows and Essara Till entering the canyon in their [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighters]].]]
The '''Naboo training canyon''' was a canyon in the outskirts of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] used by the pilots of [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Flight]] as a training ground. [[Holoprojector/Legends|Holoprojectors]] were placed throughout the canyon, which deployed holographic versions of [[Dagger-class starfighter|Dagger]] starfighters to act as targets for trainee pilots. [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]] took [[Rhys Dallows]] in a run through the canyon to train him; at the far end, they engaged in a mock [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfight]], with Dallows winning. The canyon was also suitable for racing and practice dogfights. After the start of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Naboo Resistance]] established a [[Naboo Resistance base|base]] at the far end of the canyon. Dallows [[Mission in the Naboo canyon|led]] [[Reti]], who was carrying [[Skirmish over Naboo|captured munitions]] through the canyon to meet with the resistance. Dallows helped the resistance destroy [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces attacking the base and ensured the delivery of the supplies.

==Behind the scenes==
The Naboo training canyon appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]. It also appears in the [[Star Wars: Starfighter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|game's strategy guide]]. ''Canyon Sprint,'' one of the game's bonus missions takes place in the canyon, a race between Dallows and other characters in their [[Starship/Legends|starships]].
